analysis.name: Bitcoin SV
analysis.summary: BSV近期24小时涨幅约11.8%，但链上DEX版本（Solana上的BSV/USDC）价格与主网BSV存在差异，且流动性较低。基本面缺乏新催化，新闻多为价格预测类，无实质利好。历史负面事件（51%攻击、交易所下架）仍构成风险。建议观望。

recommendation.invalidation: 若出现实质性合作或技术升级，可重新评估。

catalysts: 无明确近期催化剂，上涨可能为短期资金博弈或市场情绪波动。

latestNews.title: Bitcoin SV (BSV) Price Prediction 2026, 2027-2030: Will BSV Price Hit $100? - Coinpedia
latestNews.reason: 仅为价格预测，无实质信息。

latestNews.title: Coinbase Ending Support for Bitcoin SV - CoinDesk
latestNews.reason: 主要交易所下架，降低流动性和可信度。

latestNews.title: Binance Delists Bitcoin SV, CEO Calls Craig Wright a 'Fraud' - CoinDesk
latestNews.reason: 历史负面事件，影响市场信心。

latestNews.title: BSV Suffers 51% Attack: Report - CoinDesk
latestNews.reason: 网络安全问题，损害声誉。

fundamentals: BSV是比特币现金（BCH）的硬分叉，旨在恢复中本聪原始愿景。
主网BSV市值约2.42亿美元，排名143。
Solana上存在BSV/USDC交易对，但流动性仅153万美元，市值约305万美元，与主网BSV不同。
历史最高价489.75美元，当前价格12.09美元（主网），跌幅97.5%。
marketRead: 主网BSV 24小时涨幅11.8%，但7日涨幅仅3.48%，30日跌幅13.58%，长期趋势仍弱。
Solana上的BSV/USDC价格15.29美元，高于主网，但流动性低，可能存在操纵风险。
成交量较小，市场参与度低。
risks: 主网BSV曾遭51%攻击，安全性存疑。
主要交易所（Coinbase、Binance）已下架BSV，流动性受限。
创始人Craig Wright争议大，社区信任度低。
Solana上的BSV代币与主网无关，合约风险高。
缺乏实际应用和开发者生态。
watchlist: 是否有新的交易所上线或恢复支持。
BSV网络是否出现重大技术升级或合作。
主网BSV价格是否突破关键阻力位（如15美元）。
sourceNotes: 数据来源为CoinGecko和DexScreener，新闻来自Google News。
Solana上的BSV/USDC交易对与主网BSV不同，需注意区分。
新闻多为价格预测，缺乏实质性利好。

profile.name: Bitcoin SV
profile.description: Bitcoin SV (BSV) emerged following a hard fork of the Bitcoin Cash (BCH) blockchain in 2018, which had in turn forked from the BTC blockchain a year earlier. The goal of Bitcoin SV is to fulfil the original vision of the Bitcoin protocol and design as described in Satoshi Nakamoto’s white paper, early Bitcoin client software and known Satoshi writings. BSV aims to offer scalability and stability in line with the original description of Bitcoin as a peer-to-peer electronic cash system, as well as deliver a distributed data network that can support enterprise-level advanced blockchain applications. To this end, it has removed artificial block size limits and re-enabled Script commands and other technical capabilities which had been historically disabled or restricted by the protocol developers of the BTC blockchain. This allows the network to process tens of thousands of transactions per second while maintaining extremely low transaction fees for micropayments, in addition to offering advanced capabilities such as tokens, smart contracts, computation and other data use cases.
